tasks.title: Engine core: types, decimal, tokenizer, parser, evaluator
deliverables: src/calculator/types.ts with Token/Node/EvalContext/FormatOptions and CalcError hierarchy (DivisionByZero, Overflow, SyntaxError, MismatchedParens)
src/calculator/decimal.ts config-driven Decimal shim and precision helpers
src/calculator/tokenizer.ts implementing tokenize(input): Token[]
src/calculator/parser.ts implementing parse(tokens): Node
src/calculator/evaluator.ts implementing evaluate(node, ctx): Decimal
format(value, opts): string exported from the calculator barrel
Vitest unit tests for the tokenize->parse->evaluate->format pipeline
acceptance: Strict-mode tsc --noEmit clean; no any/casts in engine modules
Pipeline tested for core arithmetic and the four basic error kinds
No DOM/React/global dependencies in src/calculator/**
EvalContext carries angleMode and precision; no global state

tasks.title: Scientific functions and DEG/RAD angle handling
deliverables: src/calculator/scientific.ts with trig, inverse trig, hyperbolic, log/exp, powers/roots, factorial
InvalidFactorial and DomainError error kinds wired through the evaluator
DEG/RAD normalization via ctx.angleMode for angle-dependent functions
Unit tests for scientific function correctness across both angle modes
acceptance: sin/cos/tan honor angleMode; asin/acos/atan return in active mode
0.5!, (-3)! and non-integer factorial args raise InvalidFactorial
sqrt(-1), log(-5), asin(2) raise DomainError
Overflow raised for demonstrably large exponentials/factorials
Hyperbolic functions are dimensionless and ignore angle mode

tasks.title: Standard calculator UI: keypad, display, shell, error surfacing
deliverables: src/components/Keypad, Display, Shell accessible widgets
State adapter wrapping tokenize->parse->evaluate->format
CalcError.code -> localized message mapping
aria-live region for result and error announcement
Component-level RTL tests
acceptance: All controls keyboard-operable with visible focus
Result region is aria-live polite; errors announced
Responsive at 320/768/1280 px without horizontal scroll
No console errors during a standard session
Pure engine contract unchanged by UI work

tasks.title: History, settings, theme, and PWA offline
deliverables: History component storing expression + canonical result + ctx snapshot
Settings for angle mode, precision, theme, privacy/telemetry toggle
Web App Manifest and service worker for app-shell + engine-bundle caching
Offline-capable install + non-intrusive update flow
History replay verification tests
acceptance: History entry replayable offline to reproduce recorded result
Settings changes reflected on next evaluation
App fully functional with network unplugged after first install
Installable manifest valid across Chromium and Firefox
No auto-reload disrupting in-flight sessions

tasks.title: QA: engine unit, angle-mode parity, error matrix, and UI RTL suites
deliverables: Vitest engine suite covering pipeline, every error kind, both angle modes
Angle-mode parity fixture set with known-good reference values
Accessibility-oriented RTL component tests for keypad/display/history/settings
Determinism test: identical inputs + ctx yield byte-identical format output
Coverage report and failing-case triage notes
acceptance: Engine statement coverage >= 90%
Every CalcError.code has at least one triggered test case
DEG/RAD results match reference values within configured precision
RTL suite asserts keyboard operability and aria-live announcements
No flaky tests on three consecutive clean runs

tasks.title: Security review: input limits, engine surface, PWA scope
deliverables: Threat-model document covering input limits, decimal-stack overflow, history tampering, service-worker scope, offline/sandbox escape
Verification of maxNodeDepth and input-length enforcement
CI grep gate confirming no eval/new Function/dynamic import of user input
Dependency manifest review (postinstall scripts, engine requirements)
PWA caching-scope and same-origin verification
acceptance: No eval/Function/dynamic-import of user input exists in codebase
Oversize/deep input fails closed with a typed error, no renderer crash
Service worker caches same-origin assets only; no open-redirect surfaces
No credentials/telemetry read, transmitted, or persisted
Threat-model mitigations documented for every identified risk

tasks.title: Documentation: user guide, keyboard reference, accessibility, engine extension
deliverables: User guide covering keypad usage, keyboard shortcuts, scientific functions, DEG/RAD
Error-message reference listing every CalcError.code with sample input and surfaced message
Accessibility statement with supported AT, contrast modes, keyboard model
Engine-extension guide for adding scientific functions and error kinds
In-app help content consistent with shipped features
acceptance: Keyboard reference matches actual bindings
Every CalcError.code documented with example
Accessibility statement references WCAG 2.1 AA conformance claims
Extension guide shows the tokenize->parse->evaluate contract preservation
Docs reviewed for consistency with shipped feature set

tasks.title: Integration review: cross-phase contract verification and acceptance matrix walkthrough
deliverables: Signed acceptance-matrix walkthrough against acceptance-criteria.md
Cross-phase contract verification: engine exports, EvalContext shape, FormatOptions shape, CalcError.code set stable across consumers
End-to-end pipeline integration test (UI -> adapter -> engine -> format)
Open-item log with explicit waivers and rationale
Integration review report
acceptance: Every acceptance-criteria.md section satisfied or formally waived with rationale
No consumer built against a stale engine contract
End-to-end test passes for calculate, history replay, settings, and offline mode
All open items recorded for release hardening

tasks.title: Release hardening: strict-mode build, bundle budget, a11y/PWA audit, release notes
deliverables: tsc --noEmit strict cleanliness verification
Bundle-size budget verification (engine + UI gzipped)
Lighthouse performance, accessibility, and PWA category re-audit
Reproducible build verification (npm ci && npm run build && npm test twice)
Release notes enumerating changes, known limitations, and waivers
acceptance: tsc --noEmit clean with strict: true
Bundle within agreed gzipped budget
Lighthouse performance >= 90 and PWA fully passing
axe-core zero serious violations on calculator route
Clean build reproducible twice on a supported Node version
